body.title: fix-legacy-sqlite3-claudecode
body.result: replaced sqlite3 with psycopg2 in drain_learn_queue/book_learner/claude_bridge; removed dead import from cortex.py; 555 tests pass
body.description: drain_learn_queue/book_learner/claude_bridge use sqlite3 to connect to Igor's Postgres DB silently failing; dead import in cortex.py
